evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring following all Vue skill rules

assertions.trap: export default { data() {}, methods: {}, created() {}, provide() {} } uses Options API
assertions.description: Uses <script setup lang='ts'>, not Options API

assertions.trap: {{ product.price * (1 + taxRate) }} and {{ cart.reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.qty * i.price, 0) }} are inline computations in template
assertions.description: Total and taxed price computed via computed(), not inline in template

assertions.trap: cart: reactive([]) inside Options API data() mixes reactive() with Options API reactivity
this.$emit('cart-updated', this.cart) is untyped emit with no defineEmits
assertions.description: Uses defineProps<{}> and defineEmits<{}> with TypeScript generics

assertions.trap: renders userBio without any sanitization
assertions.description: v-html either removed or uses DOMPurify

assertions.trap: :key="product" uses the object itself as key instead of a stable identifier
assertions.description: v-for uses :key with stable identifier (product.id), not the object itself

assertions.trap: v-if="product.stock > 0" and v-if="product.stock <= 0" are opposite conditions without v-else
assertions.description: Opposite v-if conditions replaced with v-if/v-else pair

assertions.trap: cart.reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.qty * i.price, 0) and product.price * (1 + taxRate) are complex expressions in template
assertions.description: Complex expressions (reduce, tax calc) moved from template to script

assertions.trap: Page-level component renders raw HTML: product-card divs, cart-summary divs, page__header all inline
assertions.description: Page-level view uses components (ProductCard, CartSummary, etc.), not raw HTML/CSS

assertions.trap: product-card__row div repeated 3 times for Category, Weight, Rating with identical structure
assertions.description: product-card__row repeated 3x extracted into a component

assertions.trap: Cart state (cart reactive array), addToCart, removeFromCart methods, and provide({ cart }) are all inline in the component
assertions.description: Cart state and side effects extracted into a composable (useCart or similar)

assertions.trap: ${{ product.price * (1 + taxRate) }} and {{ item.qty * item.price }} format prices inline in template
assertions.description: Price formatting logic in utils, not inline in template/component

assertions.trap: provide() { return { cart: this.cart } } shares cart state via provide/inject instead of props
assertions.description: Data flows via props, updates via emits — not provide/inject for parent-child

assertions.trap: provide() { return { cart: this.cart } } uses provide/inject for direct parent-child communication
assertions.description: provide/inject NOT used for parent-child — only for deep tree if needed

assertions.trap: No form inputs in the component — v-model should not be added where there are no form controls
assertions.description: v-model only used for true two-way form controls, not general state

assertions.trap: Simple product list with cart — no async components or heavy rendering that would justify Suspense, KeepAlive, or v-memo
assertions.description: No unnecessary Suspense, KeepAlive, or v-memo added without justification
